report_metadata.step_description: Invoke the Verification Agent. Request the user to upload the P&ID Drawing file (PDF or Image) to visually cross-reference the mapped Asset List against the Legend.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Output must be a valid JSON object containing a 'verification_report' list with status flags for each asset.

files_read.description: P&ID drawing file for visual verification

files_output.description: Validation test report generated by step validator
